case_title: TERRENCE PHAROS VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC LIBARY

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST TERRENCE PHAROS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-30-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-15-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST TERRENCE PHAROS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-02-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-17-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY BELDON YEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2003 CONTINUED TO SEP-03-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-30-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-03-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-02-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DEFAMATION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHAROS, TERRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC LIBARY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-21-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-06-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-25-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-03-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case ordered dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Proceedings reported by Joann Prior. (212) Notice sent by Court.
